description: A client needs to update the credit card or bank account used for automatic monthly payments.

nodes.task_description: Identify the client and verify the caller has authority to make billing changes.

expected_outcome.expected: The caller is authenticated as the client's billing contact.

nodes.task_description: Update the payment information in the billing system.

expected_outcome.expected: The new credit card details are saved in the PSA/billing tool.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the client that the new payment method has been updated successfully.

expected_outcome.expected: The client is assured their information is up to date.
